overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through tall grass fields at night, approaching a traditional Japanese inn called Yotei's Shadow Inn. The weather transitions from clear night to heavy rainstorm as the character reaches the waterfront buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland field under night sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass field exploring the open landscape

entered.detail: tall green grass swaying in the wind covering the ground
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
dark blue night sky with visible stars and clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland at night, with tall grass surrounding the path. The sky is clear and dark blue, with distant lights visible on the horizon.

events.description: snow-capped mountain enters view on the right side of the frame
traditional wooden inn building becomes clearly visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking toward the inn building with the snow-capped mountain visible in the background

entered.detail: large mountain with snow-covered peak visible in the distance
traditional Japanese wooden building with lit windows and dark roof
simple wooden fence surrounding the inn property

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a majestic snow-capped mountain appears on the right and gradually shifts to the left as the camera approaches a traditional wooden inn. The building becomes more prominent, with its lit windows visible against the dark landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: Yotei's Shadow Inn waterfront during storm

events.description: heavy rain begins suddenly and text 'YOTEI'S SHADOW INN' appears on screen
scene darkens significantly as storm clouds cover the sky and rain intensifies

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path beside the inn during heavy rainfall

notable_agents.action: standing near the inn entrance holding a light source

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the inn's lights along the shoreline
dark storm clouds covering the sky with heavy rain falling
heavy rain visible falling throughout the scene
wooden path along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at Yotei's Shadow Inn as heavy rain suddenly begins to fall. The scene shifts to a stormy atmosphere with dark clouds and rain obscuring the view. The character walks along the waterfront path next to the inn, passing by NPCs standing near the entrance with lights, while the water reflects the warm glow from the building's windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene nocturnal grassland that transforms into a stormy waterfront scene at a traditional inn. It begins with the character walking through open fields of tall grass under a clear, dark blue night sky with distant lights on the horizon. As the character advances, a majestic snow-capped mountain emerges and shifts across the frame, giving way to the glowing windows of a wooden structure. The scene then shifts abruptly as heavy rain begins to fall, enveloping the landscape in a stormy atmosphere with dark clouds that obscure the view. Finally, the camera follows the character along a waterfront path beside Yotei's Shadow Inn, passing lit NPCs while the rain-slicked ground reflects the warm glow of the building.
